tasks.label: test-live-wait-debugger
args: $ws='${workspaceFolder}'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='testhost.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*$ws*Backup.IntegrationTests*" } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $env:RUN_LIVE_X_API_TESTS='1'; $env:VSTEST_HOST_DEBUG='1'; $p = Start-Process -FilePath dotnet -ArgumentList @('test', '${workspaceFolder}/Backup.IntegrationTests/Backup.IntegrationTests.csproj', '-c', 'Debug', '--no-build', '--filter', 'Category=LiveApi') -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; $deadline=(Get-Date).AddSeconds(20); do { $th = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='testhost.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*$ws*Backup.IntegrationTests*" } | Select-Object -First 1; if($th){ break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200 } while((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); if(-not $th){ throw 'testhost for Backup.IntegrationTests not found'; }; Write-Host "Started dotnet test (LiveApi). PID=$($p.Id). testhost PID=$($th.ProcessId)."

tasks.label: test-all-wait-debugger
args: $ws='${workspaceFolder}'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='testhost.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*$ws*Backup.IntegrationTests*" } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $env:VSTEST_HOST_DEBUG='1'; $p = Start-Process -FilePath dotnet -ArgumentList @('test', '${workspaceFolder}/Backup.IntegrationTests/Backup.IntegrationTests.csproj', '-c', 'Debug', '--no-build') -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; $deadline=(Get-Date).AddSeconds(20); do { $th = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='testhost.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*$ws*Backup.IntegrationTests*" } | Select-Object -First 1; if($th){ break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200 } while((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); if(-not $th){ throw 'testhost for Backup.IntegrationTests not found'; }; Write-Host "Started dotnet test (All Integration). PID=$($p.Id). testhost PID=$($th.ProcessId)."
